name: Chicken Livers and Mushroom Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken livers, cut into bite size pieces
1/2 package filo leaves, cut in half lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion and mushrooms in butter until they are limp.
2. Add the chicken livers, cut into bite-size pieces. Sauté until the livers are browned.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Pour in the red wine and beef stock or bouillon. Let it simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Reserve some of the liquid by pouring off the excess juice.
6. In a separate cup, mix 2 tablespoons cornstarch with an equal amount of the reserved juice to make a smooth paste.
7. Add this cornstarch mixture to the skillet and stir constantly until it becomes a smooth gravy.
8. Unfold the filo leaves and place a small amount of liver mixture at one end.
9. Fold over the sides and roll up tightly.
10. Chill or freeze until ready to serve.
11. When ready to bake, preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
12. Place the rolls on a cookie sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
